Interface IRasterInfoFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster info function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("43CD7AD2-77FD-4D83-A95B-4F015FCB9E87")]
public interface IRasterInfoFunctionArguments

Properties

Caching

Indicates if the raster info will be cached.

bool Caching { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Raster

The input image.

object Raster { get; set; }

object

RasterInfo
